headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Tuesday.
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Tuesday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.

raw.headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Tuesday.

headline: DXCM to Launch Dexcom Flex CGM System for Type 2 Diabetes in Germany
summary: DexCom gains 5.6% after announcing plans to launch Dexcom Flex in Germany, expanding CGM access for Type 2 diabetes patients using basal insulin or oral meds.

raw.headline: DXCM to Launch Dexcom Flex CGM System for Type 2 Diabetes in Germany
raw.summary: DexCom gains 5.6% after announcing plans to launch Dexcom Flex in Germany, expanding CGM access for Type 2 diabetes patients using basal insulin or oral meds.

headline: 14. OURA
summary: OURA, at the center of the tracking of the health and wellness boom, ranks No. 14 on CNBC’s 2026 Disruptor 50 list.
